ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sentiment data */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "neg_title" REAL /* Negative sentiment score of the title */,
  "neu_title" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score of the title */,
  "pos_title" REAL /* Positive sentiment score of the title */,
  "compound_title" REAL /* Compound sentiment score of the title */,
  "neg_body" REAL /* Negative sentiment score of the body */,
  "neu_body" REAL /* Neutral sentiment score of the body */,
  "pos_body" REAL /* Positive sentiment score of the body */,
  "compound_body" REAL /* Compound sentiment score of the body */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the sentiment data */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article or post */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the article or post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the technical indicator */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "boll_lb" REAL /* Lower Bollinger Band */,
  "boll_ub" REAL /* Upper Bollinger Band */,
  "cci_30" REAL /* Commodity Channel Index (30) */,
  "close_30_sma" REAL /* 30-day Simple Moving Average of Close price */,
  "close_60_sma" REAL /* 60-day Simple Moving Average of Close price */,
  "dx_30" REAL /* Directional Movement Index (30) */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* Relative Strength Index (14-day) */,
  "atr_14" REAL /* Average True Range (14-day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "ticker")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the social media post was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the social media post (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "user_handle" TEXT /* Handle of the user who posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "retweets" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fear_greed_index" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fear and greed index data */,
  "fear_greed" REAL /* Fear and Greed Index value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the fear and greed index data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)
